title: ampelodesmos mauritanicus var. squarrosus
intro: Ampelodesmos mauritanicus var. squarrosus, also known as the Moroccan broom or Squarrose Ampelodesmos, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ampelodesmos mauritanicus var. squarrosus include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or using its roots to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
